title: node-postgres Pools, Queries, Transactions, and Failure Semantics · Contract Lens: Pg Single Client Transaction
summary: Handlers create pools, transactions use pool.query across clients, SQL interpolates identifiers and values, clients leak on error, and ambiguous commits are blindly retried. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts pg single client transaction increment in bounded pg repository and transaction outcome contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run BEGIN, all statements, COMMIT or ROLLBACK on one client with isolation, constraints, locking, retries, and domain invariant evidence.
Acquire and release a client exactly once with finally while distinguishing acquisition, query, protocol, server, timeout, cancellation, and application failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Pg Single Client Transaction · Theory Pg Single Client Transaction
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 7896 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify pool, transaction, release, and ambiguous-commit evidence without blind replay; keep peak memory below the stated byte ceiling; then make OpenAPI and runtime disagree on nullability and block the release. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Pg Single Client Transaction contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Predict Pg Single Client Transaction · Theory Pg Single Client Transaction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for run begin, all statements, commit or rollback on one client with isolation, constraints, locking, retries, and domain invariant evidence. For Node and Express server Predict Pg Single Client Transaction · Theory Pg Single Client Transaction, keep Pg Single Client Transaction connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
